title: Runtime Validation, Parsing, and Trust Boundaries · Type Recall
summary: Parse API, storage, URL, form, and message values into trustworthy domain records without unsafe casts. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a runtime-validated public data adapter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Receive external JSON, storage, DOM, environment, and message data as unknown until evidence narrows it.
Build parsers that return typed values or structured failure paths rather than booleans that discard evidence.
Handle required, optional, deprecated, defaulted, and versioned fields with changed-schema fixtures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.typescript:
// typescript-basics cumulative strict TypeScript portfolio.
// Add one typed behavior, runtime boundary, changed case, and evidence return per activity.

steps.title: External Unknown · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — An unknown payload is alternately {kind:"ok", value:4}, {kind:"error", message:"timeout"}, and {kind:"ok", value:"4"}. Validate runtime shape before narrowing, retain the rejection reason, and make the final branch exhaustive.

Which action demonstrates External Unknown without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for receive external json, storage, dom, environment, and message data as unknown until evidence narrows it.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Unsafe Assertion Audit: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — An unknown payload is alternately {kind:"ok", value:6}, {kind:"error", message:"timeout"}, and {kind:"ok", value:"6"}. Validate runtime shape before narrowing, retain the rejection reason, and make the final branch exhaustive.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Locate and replace as, non-null, double assertions, any, and suppression directives with evidence-producing boundaries.
